rules: 卡片仅保留类型四字标题与雷达图，禁止数字序号、副标题、底部判语。人物长发飘逸，有个性动作与古风小景。

0_4.prompt: Guofeng personality card. Left: young male scholar in red-orange hanfu, long flowing hair with ribbon, standing on wooden balcony looking at distant sunset, worried patriotic pose. Right: hexagonal radar chart filled red-orange. Radar labels exactly: 感时忧世, 写意抒情, 玄思清远, 隐逸疏离, 家国情怀, 奇崛翻新. Title text only: 忧国志士. NO number, NO subtitle, NO bottom text. Soft watercolor cute guofeng.
